title: Null partition key — events for same entity scattered across partitions
expected_feedback: Standard: Partition key is null — Kafka will round-robin messages across partitions. With per-order ordering requirement, events for the same order will land in different partitions, processed by different consumers at different speeds. Result: order.created may be processed AFTER order.shipped. Fix: set partition key to the entity ID (order_id) so all events for the same order go to the same partition and are consumed in order.
